creator: barbara.xxx1975@libero.it
text:
The port of new version of bash (bash-4.0) is badly broken.

-----------------------------------
% make fetch
=> bash-4.tar.gz is not in /usr/ports/shells/bash/distinfo.
=> Either /usr/ports/shells/bash/distinfo is out of date, or
=> bash-4.tar.gz is spelled incorrectly.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/shells/bash.
-----------
And also, from the Makefile, 
CONFLICTS=              bash-[0-24-9].*
this is obviously wrong.

On my system portupgrade failed but removed the previous version denying the login to user with bash as default shell (ok, maybe this is a portupgrade problem).

Please, fix the problem, or restore the bash* ports to a previous state **ASAP**.

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/shells/bash && make
